name: Mexican Salsa
recipeIngredient: salt to taste (garlic salt can be used)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the tomatoes, onion, garlic, and jalapeño.
2. Finely chop the green bell pepper and cilantro.
3. Place all ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
4. Add salt to taste, starting with a small amount and adjusting as needed.
5. Stir in the lime juice (or lemon juice).
6. Serve with fat-free chips or enjoy on potatoes, rice, or other items in the refrigerator.
